field_rules.submission_id: Non empty string. Must be unique within a submission file.
field_rules.name: Non empty string after trimming whitespace.
field_rules.category: Non empty string. Suggested values: Wine, Whisky, Bourbon, Tequila, Rum, Cognac. Other values pass validation but will not match the catalog.
field_rules.vintage: Integer between 1800 and the current year, or null. Non integer strings are invalid.

notes: Validation runs before matching. A record that fails validation must not be matched against the catalog. Each invalid record should be reported with the failing field and reason so the partner can correct and resubmit.
